description: Working on the Core AI Team for IBM i: AI and Open Source, building a lightweight, enterprise-grade Model Context Protocol (MCP) server in Java 17. The system enables clients in highly regulated industries (such as banking and healthcare) to securely build and deploy autonomous AI agents without relying on standard open-source Node.js dependency stacks. Also supported testing of a new agentic AI product for private previews with business clients.

Working with GE Healthcare on internal tooling, focusing on organizing and visualizing system microservices to improve workflow insight. Designing front-end interfaces that help engineers monitor processes and support more effective automated testing.
